docs:
# Number Ticker
Animated figures for stats, dashboards, and compact metric cards.
## Import
```tsx
import { NumberTicker } from "@/components/ui/number-ticker";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<NumberTicker value={12840} direction="up" decimalPlaces={0} delay={0} />
```
## Props
- **value** (number) — default: `12840`: Value
- **direction** (string) — default: `"up"`: Direction
- **decimalPlaces** (number) — default: `0`: Decimals
- **delay** (number) — default: `0`: Delay (s)
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add number-ticker
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/number-ticker
```
